name: Alsatian Cassoulet
recipeIngredient: 2 large Heads cauliflower; cut into florets
3 cups Vegetable stock or dark beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Combine all ingredients, except flour, in a large roasting pan or casserole dish. Sprinkle the top with flour.
3. Place in the oven and cook, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to 250°F. Cover and cook for 20 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve hot.
Per serving: 442 cal; 43 g prot; 132 mg sod; 64 g carb; 5 g fat; 0 mg chol; 116 mg calcium
Source: Vegetarian Gourmet, Winter 93/MM by DEEANNE
